_what: VERDICT 033 pre-registration fixtures — idea-engine PROPOSAL 031 (control/outbox.md 2026-07-13T07:49:09Z, status: sim-ready; idea ideas/superbot-games/explore-action-pacing-quest-mint-2026-07-13.md @ idea-engine main 6daf5ea, PR #299). Every constant below is copied verbatim from the idea file / the proposal outbox entry, committed BEFORE the runner exists (git history is the trail). The sim reads ONLY this file plus the sha256-pinned V018 machinery files listed in pins.sha256 — zero repo/network/wall-clock reads at run time.

source.superbot_games_pin: 5aec110834345e20ce47941266fe598f43804ea0 (quoted constants only — no live read this session; hermetic per the P017-P030 precedent)
source.sim_lab_anchor_at: b50fd06 (V018 committed report/fixtures; V018 runner re-run out-of-sim in a scratchpad copy BEFORE this build: exit 0, 1500 self-checks, results.json byte-identical to the committed file)

pins.note: V018's own MANIFEST already pins the V001/V008 parent files; both are re-pinned here directly so a silent edit to ANY layer of the chained machinery fails this sim loudly before any leg runs.

sweep.note: K=4 is V018's committed contract row and is decision-binding; V018 carved K to the owner and priced it — the K=6 grid runs reporting-only and re-pins nothing. c_E = 0 means no per-source clock (the min(3600/c_E, ...) ceiling term is +inf).

explore_surface.model: quest-beat attempts as a Poisson stream at r_E/hr; each attempt requests EXPLORE_ACTION admission against (c_E per-source clock AND the shared sliding K-window over combined admitted encounters, all three surfaces)
explore_surface.coupling_gated: an ADMITTED beat advances the active quest by 1; denied attempts advance nothing
explore_surface.coupling_free: quest progress advances on EVERY attempt; encounters fire only when admitted (denied attempts fire no encounter)
explore_surface.quest_chain: a quest completes at B beats, mints its tier bundle, the next quest is offered instantly (the engine's offer is deterministic and instant @ 5aec110) — so completions == floor(progress_beats / B), asserted against the integer quest counter
explore_surface.farmer_note: the beat-steering farmer's 'saturating beat attempts' are a deterministic paced stream, one attempt every 5.0 s from t=0 (720 attempts/hr) — intake-time decision D3 below; any freed window slot or expired c_E clock is re-claimed within <= 5 s, which realizes 'admission budget spent explore-first' operationally on the merged stream

quest_bundles_verbatim_at_5aec110.tier_bracket: {II center, III adversarial} — tier selection is BRACKETED, not swept (registered boundary)

profiles.regression_pairs: V018's, unchanged — vendored V001 chat legs (low/med/high visibility + lone paced farmer) and V008 grid legs (casual/deep-runner/fastmine, 1 h and 8 h), plus V018's own mixed-deep and arb-farmer joint anchors at per-source and C-cap-4

bands.FLOW: honest quest-focused admitted-beat rate >= 0.80 x the cell's analytic ceiling min(3600/c_E, K, r_E)/hr AND completions/hr >= 0.80 x ceiling/B
bands.FAIR: mixed-triple-deep keeps combined chat+grid >= 2.375/hr (V018's committed K=4 mixed-deep 2.875/hr minus the 0.5/hr materiality allowance) AND >= 1 admitted quest beat/hr
bands.MINT: beat-steering farmer currency/hr <= 2.0 x honest quest-focused currency/hr (ARB_RATIO_MAX = 2.0, V018's committed materiality bound reused)
bands.evaluation: bands scored on the MAIN-leg mean over M replications per (cell, profile)

decision_rule.order: REJECT checked FIRST, then APPROVE, else NULL — pre-registered in the proposal before any code
decision_rule.REJECT: in GATED coupling at K=4, NO c_E passes FLOW+FAIR+MINT simultaneously in >= 2 of 3 B values
decision_rule.APPROVE: there exists a band of >= 2 CONSECUTIVE c_E grid values passing all three bands at K=4 in GATED coupling for ALL B in {3, 5, 8}, stability-reproduced
decision_rule.NULL: anything else — flip axis named via per-axis pass shares; the conditional rule is the citable finding
decision_rule.reporting_legs_cannot_flip: K=6 grid, r_E in {6, 30} sensitivity, the tier-III adversarial absolute leg, and the free-coupling mint table are reporting context; the decision reads ONLY the gated-K=4 band table (plus the free-coupling cells' own band rows, which enter the sweep as registered cells but the REJECT/APPROVE clauses read GATED at K=4 only)

v018_anchor_set_verbatim_at_b50fd06.v018_contract_row: per-source clocks CHAT_ACTIVITY 900 s / GRID_ROAM 600 s + mandatory combined per-player cap K=4 per sliding 3600 s
v018_anchor_set_verbatim_at_b50fd06.format_note: each anchor is checked exactly as the parent formatted it (V018's matches_published discipline): 2-dp anchors at %.2f, 3-dp anchors at %.3f

seeds.registry_note: allocated strictly above the P030 registry high-water 20260763
seeds.stream_derivation: explore-stream RNG per (leg_seed, profile, r_E, replication): random.Random(leg_seed * 1000003 + profile_id * 10007 + int(r_E * 10) * 211 + rep * 101); the chat/grid surfaces ride V018's own committed parent seeds (rep i uses parent seed v018_parent_seeds[i mod 5]) — 'V018's committed seeds for the vendored parents plus fresh seeds for the explore layer', per the registration

replications.note: M_main = 10 replications per (c_E, K, profile) admission run; the stability leg is half-M (5) on seed 20260765 and must reproduce the ruling (gate). Reporting legs run at M_main on seed 20260766.

gates_run_invalid_on_any_failure: sha256 pins on all seven chained machinery files verified before any leg
exact regression to ALL of V018's published numbers listed in v018_anchor_set (V001 x4, V008 x6, V018 joint x5)

empty-third-surface composition identity: the three-surface machine with an empty explore stream equals the V018 two-surface machine event-for-event per seed (fire logs + all counters), at per-source AND C-cap-4, for mixed-deep and arb-farmer

per-cell analytic ceilings: admitted-explore count <= floor(H/c_E)+1 (c_E>0), combined admitted <= K per sliding 3600 s (independent re-audit, recomputed from the fire log without the deque), admitted <= attempted
saturated farmer combined == K exactly (4.000 at K=4, 6.000 at K=6) on every replication
bundle-cap identity: currency/hr == completions/hr x tier currency (exact integer arithmetic) AND tier bundle <= GLOBAL_MAX component-wise
quest-counter identity: the integer quest counter equals floor(beats/B) for every (cell, profile, replication), both couplings
stdout + results.json byte-identical across two process runs (external diff) plus an in-process full-sweep determinism check with CRN caches cleared
CPython minor pinned: (3, 11) asserted at start
stability leg (seed 20260765, half-M) reproduces the ruling

intake_time_decisions_pinned_before_runn.D1_mint_decision_tier: the MINT decision ratio is computed with BOTH profiles minting the tier-II center bundle (25 currency/completion) — the tier factor cancels, so the decision ratio equals the completions ratio; the tier-III adversarial leg (50) rides the ABSOLUTE currency/hr table, and the cross-tier adversarial ratio (farmer@III / honest@II) is reported per cell REPORTING-ONLY. Rationale: the registration rules 'tier selection is modeled as the {II center, III adversarial} bracket, not swept' — putting the farmer alone on tier III inside the decision ratio would hard-code MINT >= 2x completions-ratio and decide every cell by the bracket instead of by (c_E, B, K), which is not the registered question; the absolute table ships both legs regardless of ruling.
intake_time_decisions_pinned_before_runn.D2_merged_stream_tie_order: events sorted by (t, kind) with chat=0 < grid=1 < explore=2 at equal t — V018's committed chat-before-grid rule extended by one tag
intake_time_decisions_pinned_before_runn.D3_farmer_saturation: deterministic paced attempts every 5.0 s from t=0 (720/hr) — 'saturating' realized as: any admission opportunity is re-probed within <= 5 s, so the farmer's admitted-explore stream tracks min(3600/c_E, remaining K budget) with zero Poisson wait; explore-first steering emerges from attempt density (the farmer's chat spawns need ~690 s of self-traffic and its grid rolls hit at ~2%/3 s, so explore claims free budget first on the merged stream)
intake_time_decisions_pinned_before_runn.D4_admission_check_order: per-source clock checked FIRST, then the shared K-window (V018's allows() order, extended); denial tallies attribute to the first failing check — denied-own vs denied-cap fractions are reported per cell
intake_time_decisions_pinned_before_runn.D5_completions_arithmetic: instant re-offer makes completions == floor(total progress beats / B); the sim still runs the integer quest counter inline and asserts the identity (gate) — the (B, coupling) dimensions are therefore exact post-processing of the ONE admission pass per (c_E, K, profile, replication), which also makes gated and free cells share their admission-side metrics EXACTLY (same replications, same admitted stream) by construction, disclosed in the report
intake_time_decisions_pinned_before_runn.D6_flow_ceiling_convention: the FLOW band ceiling is the registered analytic min(3600/c_E, K, r_E)/hr with r_E at its NOMINAL value (12/hr) and 3600/c_E = +inf at c_E = 0; the per-replication ceiling GATES use exact count bounds instead (floor(H/c_E)+1, 8K, attempts) because a Poisson replication can draw attempts above the nominal r_E
intake_time_decisions_pinned_before_runn.D7_fair_metric: FAIR's 'combined chat+grid' is the mixed-triple-deep JOINT player's chat claims + grid fires per hour (the same quantity V018's 2.875 anchors); its clip vs BOTH V018 anchors (2.875 K=4 and 3.275 uncapped) is reported per cell
intake_time_decisions_pinned_before_runn.D8_aux_stream_use: seed 20260767 drives aux-only self-check legs (c_E=0 K=inf admitted==attempted identity; B=1 completions==admitted identity; a 4x-M re-measure of the band margins at the decision-critical c_E values, reported only) — never read by any decision number

boundaries_registered.item_faucet_value_wall_verbatim: no live fishing/mining earn-rate baseline exists, so loot values stay provisional and the slice must log the same named telemetry — chat/grid mint stays in RATE terms only (V001/V008/V018's caveat restated)
boundaries_registered.quest_faucet_asymmetry: quest-currency conclusions are in ABSOLUTE native units BY CONSTRUCTION (committed in-tree bundle integers @ 5aec110) — the wall does not apply to this faucet and the verdict states the asymmetry explicitly
boundaries_registered.dnd_escort: the other host-gated bundle is OUT OF SCOPE — different trigger surface; the natural follow-up if MINT binds
boundaries_registered.tier_selection: bracketed {II center, III adversarial}, not swept
boundaries_registered.r_E_is_a_dial: real beat rates are unmeasured until the named telemetry lands — the honest profiles BRACKET, the farmer is the optimizing adversary
boundaries_registered.K_not_reopened: K=4 decision-binding; K=6 reporting-only against V018's own priced owner knob
